title: 4 White 1x4 Bricks / Blue LED Downlights in One Row (Four in One Downlights) USB Powered - 100% Compatible with Lego Bricks
features: WIDELY USED Each 1x4 brick/blue LED downlight attaches to the ceiling of your building block, wall or bottom of items. Easy way to make your stone sets or MOCs light up! Our bricks are 100% compatible with LEGO and all major branded bricks.
Specification: These include 4 white 1x4 bricks/blue LED downlights in a series kit, powered by USB.
Kit length: the total length is approx. 51 inches. The wire between the individual stones is approx. 9 inches. Minor length variations are due to the handmade nature of this lighting set.
HIGH QUALITY The wires are designed to be placed between the bolts. The wires are thin and strong.
Easy installation: insert the Brick LEDs into your brick or model, turn them on and you're done. The wire is easy to hide and does not affect the overall appearance.
